title: Source Citation
description: Citation record for any non-trivial data point. Every L1-L3 datum must have at least one source.

url.description: Direct link to the primary source.

publisher_tier.description: Publisher quality tier (separate from datum grade).

quote.description: 1-2 sentence verbatim quote supporting the data point.

cross_validated_by.description: URLs of independent secondary sources confirming the data.

is_secondary.description: True if this is a secondary citation; primary source should be linked separately.
